wordplay_note: A high vantage point — he sees through each subjective universe
card_description: Jack Hamilton (meaning "Hamilton = beautiful mountain") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Eye in the Sky*. Electronics worker who falls into a particle accelerator and enters multiple subjective realities. Name note: A high vantage point — he sees through each subjective universe. The observer passing through solipsistic worlds — each person's inner reality made external. First appears in *Eye in the Sky*.

reference.brief: Electronics worker who falls into a particle accelerator and enters multiple subjective realities
reference.significance: The observer passing through solipsistic worlds — each person's inner reality made external
